[[File:Walangtrooper.png|thumb|left|150px|Stormtroopers loyal to Walang Grazz.]]
'''Walang Grazz''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] who became a [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. After the fall of the Empire, [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]] loyal to the former Moff, denoted by circular insignias on their helmets defended one of the self-styled warlord's bunker complexes.<ref name="MBC" /> Grazz fashioned a small empire and became one of the many warlords who pestered the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Grazz and Warlord Admiral [[Gaen Drommel|Drommel's]] forces were later overrun by [[Prince-Admiral/Legends|Prince-Admiral]] [[Delak Krennel]] of the [[Ciutric Hegemony]].<ref name="Despoilers1">{{SW|url=news/the-imperial-warlords-despoilers-of-an-empire-part-1|series=The Imperial Warlords: Despoilers of an Empire|text=Part 1|nolive=1}}</ref>

== Behind the scenes ==
[[File:XR-85_Coruscant.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Stormtroopers with red circles painted on their helmets]]
Grazz's Stormtroopers with circle-painted helmets from the ''[[Star Wars Miniatures Battles Companion]]'' is reminiscent of the Stormtroopers with red circles painted on their helmets that [[Second Battle of Coruscant|fight]] during the [[Imperial Civil War|Imperial Mutiny]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in ''[[Dark Empire 1]].''<ref name="MBC" /><ref>''[[Dark Empire 1]]''</ref>
